name: PioneerRx Pharmacy Management API
what_it_does: PioneerRx REST API for independent pharmacy management system. Enables AI agents to manage prescription filling and dispensing workflows, access patient medication profiles and refill history, retrieve insurance claim and adjudication data, manage inventory and drug procurement, access adherence and medication synchronization data, handle prior authorization workflows, integrate with prescription data networks, and connect pharmacy operations with clinical and health system partners.
use_cases: Managing prescription refills and medication synchronization from pharmacy automation agents
Accessing patient medication profiles from clinical integration agents
Retrieving insurance claim status from revenue cycle agents
Tracking inventory and drug procurement from pharmacy operations agents
not_for: Hospital inpatient pharmacy without retail dispensing focus
Chain pharmacy without independent pharmacy workflow
best_when: An independent retail pharmacy using PioneerRx wants AI agents to automate medication synchronization, refill management, insurance claims, and patient adherence workflows.
avoid_when: HIPAA+DEA: Prescription data includes protected health information and controlled substance records. DEA Schedule II-V prescriptions require strict record-keeping. Automated dispensing workflows require pharmacist final verification under state pharmacy law.

auth.notes: PioneerRx uses API key authentication with pharmacy-level credentials. Partner program for technology integrations. Scopes control prescription, patient, inventory, and claims data. Third-party integration via certified partner program.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — pharmacy management subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly per-pharmacy pricing; pricing based on prescription volume
pricing.notes: Shreveport, Louisiana. Founded 2008. Acquired by Rx30 parent company (Transaction Data Systems) 2020. Market leader for independent pharmacy management. 5,200+ independent pharmacies. Strong adherence and medication synchronization tools. Competes with RxDispense and Liberty Software.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in partner portal

known_agent_gotchas: HIPAA+DEA: Prescription data is PHI; controlled substances require DEA CSOS compliance
No public MCP server — scoped API key with certified partner program
No webhooks — polling required for prescription and refill updates
Pharmacist final verification required by law — automation cannot complete dispensing without RPh sign-off
Controlled substance records (CSOS) have permanent retention requirements
State pharmacy law variation — dispensing rules differ by state for AI automation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Prescription PHI and controlled substance records. HIPAA, DEA CSOS, PCI-DSS. Scoped API key. US data residency. Pharmacist verification mandatory. State pharmacy law compliance.

security_score_components.security_notes: Prescription PHI and controlled substance data. HIPAA, DEA CSOS, PCI-DSS. Scoped API key. US data residency. Pharmacist verification required.
